scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/core dist/hooks dist/utils && cp src/index.js dist/index.js && cp src/InfiniteCanvas.jsx dist/InfiniteCanvas.jsx && cp src/styles.less dist/styles.less && cp src/core/viewport.js dist/core/viewport.js && cp src/hooks/useInfiniteCanvas.js dist/hooks/useInfiniteCanvas.js && cp src/utils/constants.js dist/utils/constants.js
